title: Intensify Efforts for LaRouche's Oasis Plan to End War in SW Asia
description:
Join Helga Zepp-LaRouche in her weekly Live-Dialogue Wednesday, December 6 at 11am EDT/5pm CET!
Please submit your questions ahead of time to questions@schillerinstitute.org
Or you can write them live in the YouTube chat.

Against the backdrop of Israels ruthless expansion of the military campaign into the south of the Gaza Strip, and the call on the residents of Khan Younis to leave the city, which they had fled to before, Helga Zepp-LaRouche emphasized in discussions with members: "We absolutely have to escalate our campaign from full-package ceasefire, immediately, a comprehensive Middle East peace conference immediately, and then the two-state solution and the economic development of the Oasis Plan." (https://laroucheorganization.com/article/2023/11/01/pamphlet-peace-through-development-palestine-and-israel-larouche-oasis-plan) 

In closing, Zepp-LaRouche said, "So I think it’s really important that we somehow get people to understand, what is happening right now is not just the genocide in Gaza, I think it’s the final stone in the long series of undermining fundamental American self-interest."


Join the initiatives of Helga Zepp-LaRouche and the Schiller Institute to urgently mobilize for an immediate ceasefire, a comprehensive Middle East peace conference, a two-state solution, and the implementation of LaRouche's Oasis Plan.
